post.description: Replaces a drive which is allocated to a VPSA. This command will allocate a new drive of the same drive type for the VPSA, replace the drive in the RaidGroup and free the replaced drive back to the Zadara Cloud repository.
Enables a drive's LED.
Disables a drive's LED.
Enables a drive. Adds the drive back to the Zadara Cloud inventory. Enabled drive can be allocated to a VPSA.
Disables a drive. Removes the drive from the Zadara Cloud inventory. Disabled drives can not be allocated to VPSA
Removes a drive. Removed drives can not be restored.
Designates a drive as a cache drive.
Undesignate a drive as cache drive.

get.description: Gets all support tickets settings

expiration_date.description: Support ticket suppression expiration date and time (UTC)

priority.description: Support ticket priority (empty string for default)

zsnap.description: Support ticket zsnap (empty string for default)

to_user.description: Support ticket send to users (empty string for default)

rate_limit.description: Rate limit must be at least 1

message.example: Ticket settings set
Ticket settings deleted

get.description: Gets all cloud upload endpoints including default endpoints

parameters.name: methods_requested
parameters.description: Upload methods requested

post.description: Creates a new cloud upload endpoint

config.description: Endpoint configuration JSON, depending on the chosen upload method. For 's3_aws' and 's3_zios' methods, config should include 'access_key', 'secret_key' and 'region'. For 's3_zios' method, config should also include 'endpoint'. For 'ftp' method, config should include 'server', 'user', 'password', 'use_proxy' (boolean '0' or '1').

message.example: Successfully created endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

put.description: Updates an existing cloud upload endpoint

config.description: Endpoint configuration JSON, depending on the chosen upload method. For 's3_aws' and 's3_zios' methods, config should include 'access_key', 'secret_key' and 'region'. For 's3_zios' method, config should also include 'endpoint'. For 'ftp' method, config should include 'server', 'user', 'password', 'use_proxy' (boolean '0' or '1').

message.example: Successfully updated endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

delete.description: Deletes an existing cloud upload endpoint. Make sure no VPSA Storage Array or VPSA Object Storage are using the cloud endpoint in their upload endpoints configurations.

message.example: Successfully deleted endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

get.description: Gets cloud endpoint configs by upload types

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Upload types

post.description: Creates cloud endpoints configurations for upload type

endpoints_config.description: Endpoints configurations to set for the upload type. Each configuration must specify endpoint name. S3 endpoints configurations must also specify bucket name. Up to 1 endpoint for zsnap type, and up to 3 endpoints for all other types.

message.example: Successfully created endpoints configurations for upload type 'TYPE'

put.description: Adds more cloud endpoints configurations for upload type

endpoints_config.description: Endpoints configurations to be added to the existing endpoints configurations for the upload type. Each configuration must specify endpoint name. S3 endpoints configurations must also specify bucket name. Up to 1 endpoint for zsnap type, and up to 2 endpoints for all other types.

message.example: Successfully added endpoints configurations for upload type 'TYPE'

delete.description: Deletes an existing cloud endpoint configuration for upload type

message.example: Successfully deleted endpoint configuration for type 'TYPE'

get.description: Gets Cloud Control IP Whitelisting status
Gets Cloud Control IP Whitelist entries

post.description: Enable Cloud Control IP Whitelisting
Disable Cloud Control IP Whitelisting
Add Cloud Control IP Whitelisting entries

entries.description: Add commas between each entry fields. ip_or_cidr: IPv4/IPv6 IP or CIDR. app_access: 'cc' (command center port 8888), 'pp' (provisioning portal ports 443,80) or 'pp/cc' (all of them). comment: up to 50 characters.

put.description: Update Cloud Control IP Whitelisting entries. Deletes existing entries and creates new ones with a different ID.

entries.description: Add commas between each entry fields. id: must be in quotes. ip_or_cidr: IPv4/IPv6 IP or CIDR. app_access: 'cc' (command center port 8888), 'pp' (provisioning portal ports 443,80) or 'pp/cc' (all of them). comment: up to 50 characters.

delete.description: Delete Cloud Control IP Whitelisting entries

config.description: Endpoint configuration JSON, depending on the chosen upload method. For 's3_aws' and 's3_zios' methods, config should include 'access_key', 'secret_key' and 'region'. For 's3_zios' method, config should also include 'endpoint'. For 'ftp' method, config should include 'server', 'user', 'password', 'use_proxy' (boolean '0' or '1').

For 's3_zios' method, config should also include 'endpoint'. For 'ftp' method, config should include 'server', 'user', 'password', 'use_proxy' (boolean '0' or '1').

message.example: Successfully updated vpsa endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

get.description: Gets all VPSA Object Storage upload endpoints including default endpoints

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

parameters.name: methods_requested
parameters.description: Uploaded methods requested, for example: s3_aws,s3_zios,ftp

post.description: Creates a new VPSA Object Storage upload endpoint

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

config.description: Endpoint configuration JSON, depending on the chosen upload method. For 's3_aws' and 's3_zios' methods, config should include 'access_key', 'secret_key' and 'region'. For 's3_zios' method, config should also include 'endpoint'. For 'ftp' method, config should include 'server', 'user', 'password', 'use_proxy' (boolean '0' or '1').

message.example: Successfully created VPSA Object Storage endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

put.description: Updates an existing VPSA Object Storage upload endpoint

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

config.description: Endpoint configuration JSON, depending on the endpoint's upload method. For 's3_aws' and 's3_zios' methods, config should include 'access_key', 'secret_key' and 'region'. For 's3_zios' method, config should also include 'endpoint'. For 'ftp' method, config should include 'server', 'user', 'password', 'use_proxy' (boolean '0' or '1').

message.example: Successfully updated VPSA Object Storage endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

delete.description: Deletes an existing VPSA Object Storage upload endpoint

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

message.example: Successfully deleted VPSA Object Storage endpoint ENDPOINT_NAME

get.description: Gets VPSA Object Storage endpoint configs by upload types

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: A string representing an array of the upload types separated by commas. For example: 'mag, config'.

post.description: Creates VPSA Object Storage endpoints configurations for upload type

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

message.example: Successfully created VPSA Object Storage endpoints configurations for upload type "TYPE

put.description: Adds more VPSA Object Storage endpoints configurations for upload type

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

message.example: Successfully added VPSA Object Storage endpoints configurations for upload type TYPE

delete.description: Deletes an existing VPSA Object Storage endpoint configuration for upload type

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

message.example: Successfully deleted VPSA Object Storage endpoint configuration for type TYPE

get.description: Get VPSA Object Storage Generic Configuration Keys

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

post.description: Create VPSA Object Storage Zadara Configuration Key

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

put.description: Update VPSA Object Storage Zadara Configuration Key value

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

message.example: Could not find this VPSA a generic key named global.new_key

delete.description: Delete VPSA Object Storage Zadara Configuration Key

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The VPSA Object Storage 'id' or 'internal-name' value as returned by get_all_zioses.

message.example: Could not find this VPSA a generic key named global.new_key

endpoints_config.description: Endpoints configurations to set for the upload type. Each configuration must specify endpoint name. S3 endpoints configurations must also specify bucket name. Maximum to 3 endpoints. Cloud endpoints can also be specified (see 'Get cloud settings' api).

cluster_ip.description: The IP address of the cluster.

cluster_storage_type.description: The storage type of the cluster.

general_info.example: Mellanox Technologies MT27520 Family ConnectX-3 Pro

pageParam.name: page
pageParam.description: The page number to start from.

perPageParam.name: per_page
perPageParam.description: The total number of records to return.
